subject: Re:
body:
Dear Jeffery,

The best solution is to put you in contact with Philippe Castro who works on the film with Serge Moati and who speaks english.

Serge Moati doesn't speak english.

Here are the contacts from Philippe: ██████████████████ and ██████████████████

Withe my friendship,

Jack

subject: Re:
body: i was offline for yom kippur . can you put me in direct contact.? happy holiday

subject: Re:
body:
Dear Jerffrey,

Dear Jerffrey,

Have you received my email about Serge Moati's film project?

Our recent conversation on Trump was exciting.

Once again you are right.

See you soon,

With my friendship,

Jack
